name: Notion
description: AI-powered all-in-one workspace: notes, tasks, wikis, databases, projects, calendar. For individuals and teams. 100M+ users.

pricing.free: Unlimited storage (individual), 10 external guests, 7-day history, 5MB file limit, basic AI trial
pricing.plus: $10/member/mo (annual) — unlimited collaborative blocks, unlimited files, 30-day history, integrations
pricing.business: $20/member/mo (annual) — SAML SSO, AI agents, enterprise search, AI meeting notes, 90-day history
pricing.enterprise: Custom — zero LLM data retention, SCIM, audit logs, unlimited history

top_praise: Unmatched flexibility and customization — can build almost any workflow
Comprehensive tool — replaces Evernote, Trello, Google Docs, spreadsheets
AI assistance for writing and brainstorming
top_complaints: Mobile app is near unusable — 3.2s average load time (36x slower than Obsidian)
Forced AI integration — intrusive buttons users can't hide
Data loss risks — accidental deletion hard to recover
Years of unresolved mobile bugs — freezing, jitter, crashes
one_star_issues: Screen jittery for months with no fix
web_themes: Obsidian switchers praise privacy and offline; Notion users envy speed
sentiment.positioning: The all-in-one workspace for knowledge workers and teams. Dominant market share but vulnerable on mobile experience and complexity.
